notes: CRITICAL WEAKNESS: This is NOT raw per-galaxy data. It is 17 binned rows with round-number CW/CCW counts that appear to be manually constructed summary bins — not extracted from any specific published table. Identical copy at data/galaxy_spin_bins_example.csv. Includes 'SDSS' 'HST' and 'JWST' labels but JWST galaxy spin catalogs do not exist in the cited form. The N_cw/N_ccw values (e.g. 25420/24580) are suspiciously round and do not correspond to any specific published counts.
Exact duplicate of galaxy_spin_data.csv. Same checksum.

HONEST: Clearly documented as 'reconstructed from published tables.' 5 survey-level aggregate rows extracted from Shamir (2024) paper text and tables. Much better documented than galaxy_spin_data.csv. Header says 'NOT from a downloadable machine-readable catalog.'
4-row summary: SDSS_DR7 / PanSTARRS / JWST_JADES / LSST_Y10. Contains model-predicted asymmetries. LSST_Y10 is a forecast. PanSTARRS and LSST Asymmetry_obs are blank.
3-row summary: Planck / SH0ES / SpinTorsion model values. Published comparison values.
3-row H(z) comparison: LCDM vs SpinTorsion at z=0/0.5/1.0. Derived from model.
4-row model prediction: Omega_omega vs z. Pure theory curve.
Fine-tuning comparison: LCDM / Quintessence / SpinTorsion. Pedagogical summary.
5-row forecast timeline: 2025/2027/2030. Projection values, not observational data.
Theory EE power spectrum from CAMB. Standard cosmological computation, fully reproducible.
CMB-S4 noise specification. Based on published performance expectations. Reproducible.
Projection timeline spreadsheet for web visualization. Combined = sqrt(cmb^2 + gal^2). Not observational data.
3-row toy model illustrating rotation impact on expansion. Pedagogical.
LQG Holst action illustration data. Theory-derived.
Galaxy spin figure data in spreadsheet form. Same underlying data issues as galaxy_spin_data.csv.
Tension resolution comparison data.
H0/sigma8 model comparison overview.
H(z) detailed comparison.
Parameter naturalness comparison data.
Observational timeline forecast data.
24k-row parameter scan grid. Derived from theoretical model + BBN/CMB consistency checks. Fully reproducible from code.
32k-row decay parameter scan. Derived from theoretical model. Fully reproducible from code.
100k Monte Carlo sensitivity samples. Derived from theoretical model + galaxy spin counts. Fully reproducible.
SYNTHETIC DATA: 2000-row catalog with 'syn_cw_' prefixed IDs, random coordinates, and simulated GZ vote fractions. Not real galaxy data. Used only for pipeline testing.
Null test version of synthetic catalog. 200 rows.
Live convergence diagnostics from running MCMC chains. Updated hourly.
Per-chain mean parameter values. Internal diagnostic.
Maps dataset names to chain directory paths.
ADS literature search results for galaxy spin papers 2024-2026. Machine-readable bibliography.
Master dataset registry for Paper 2 tracks. Well-documented provenance for each entry.
Reference parameter values from Planck 2018. No download needed — values cited from published tables.
Planck PR4 NPIPE maps. Downloaded to RunPod pod, not mirrored locally. ~13 GB.
Galaxy Zoo DECaLS volunteer classifications. Downloaded to RunPod pod only. ~314k galaxies.
